ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived (1 for survived, 0 for did not survive) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male, female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger in years */,
  "n_siblings_spouses" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of travel */,
  "deck_id" TEXT /* Deck where the passenger was located */,
  "embark_town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the embarkation town */,
  "alone" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger traveled alone (1 for alone, 0 for not alone) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number for the voyage */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Specific cabin number */,
  "lifeboat_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lifeboat the passenger boarded (if applicable) */,
  "body_number" INTEGER /* Body number assigned after the disaster (if applicable) */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Date the passenger embarked */,
  "disembarked" TEXT /* Date the passenger disembarked (if applicable) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the passenger */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embark_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("embark_town_id") REFERENCES embark_towns ("embark_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the class */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Range of fares for the class (e.g., $50 - $100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck (e.g., A, B, C, D, E) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deck */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the deck */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available on the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embark_towns" (
  "embark_town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation town */,
  "embark_town_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation town (e.g., Southampton, Cherbourg, Queenstown) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation town */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the embarkation town */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the embarkation town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embark_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_companions" (
  "companion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel companion entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "companion_type" TEXT /* Type of companion (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  "companion_count" INTEGER /* Number of companions of this type */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Detailed relationship (e.g., brother, sister, husband, wife) */,
  "companion_name" TEXT /* Full name of the companion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("companion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_companions_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the change (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
